markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on project status, new initiatives, and workflow evolution.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Scaling to 300+ SDRs is the primary challenge.** Current artifact delivery (long docs) is unscalable; the team needs a system to deliver insights directly into SDR workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [**Q4 focus shifts to retail and ABX.** With EMEA prioritizing retail, the team will create an "ABX kit" to enable marketers to use account insights for content (blogs, ads, roundtables).](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [**Emily Erdman joins as Rachael's right-hand.** She will help scale programs and improve the feedback loop, which is currently ad hoc.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [**SaaS vertical work begins in November.** The key challenge is defining the value proposition for SaaS vs. SaaS R0 and Workforce Identity.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Topics

### Current State: Workflow & Scaling Challenge

  - [**Process:** Growth X uses AI researcher workflows to create consistent account-based briefs and guides for SDRs.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Delivering long-form documents is unscalable for Okta's 300+ SDRs.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [**Goal:** Find a system to deliver insights directly into SDR workflows (e.g., Clay, spreadsheets), avoiding direct CRM writes.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
  - [**Feedback Loop:** Currently ad hoc, relying on Rachael's field updates.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
      - [**Impact:** The team's primary feedback source, Nick Winkler, is moving to an AE role.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)

### Q4 Strategy: Retail & ABX

  - [**Retail Focus:** EMEA's Q4 priority on retail makes the existing work highly relevant.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
  - [**New Initiative: ABX Kit:**](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
      - [**Goal:** Enable marketers to use account insights for content creation (blogs, ads, roundtables), moving from loose messaging to targeted campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1195.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The initiative is an experiment to weave ABM and sales into a true Account-Based Experience (ABX).](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [**Artifact Validation:** The team will test new artifacts (Hospitality, FinServe, Healthcare) to ensure they are self-explanatory for new SDRs or marketers.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)

### Future Work: SaaS Vertical

  - [**Timeline:** Work begins in November.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Key Challenge:** Clearly defining the value proposition for SaaS vs. SaaS R0 and Workforce Identity.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Scope:** Create foundational artifacts for all business segments (SMB, Commercial, Enterprise), despite the current focus on Enterprise.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1582.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Rachael:**](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
      - [Share SaaS vertical notes and resources with Growth X.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
      - [Send the "ABX strategy prompt" to Kyle.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1750.0)
  - [**Growth X:**](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
      - [Await SaaS resources before starting work.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
      - [Hold on new account requests for now.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [**Emily & Rachael:**](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - [Plan enablement and adoption for new artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1144.0)
      - [Test new artifacts for clarity and completeness.](https://fathom.video/share/ny_FgsJz4Hp1Hxih2yXWHqkWb1sxzTox?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
